shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The slime family eye spacing and rounded silhouette language remain consistent.
differences: The fill shifts to deep jade and navy accents that communicate weight value 4.
The idle loop slows to 6 FPS and uses a denser downward compression.
A bright gold inner spark hints at the adjacency weight bonus.

context.usage: Heavy merge outcome that strongly affects balance calculations.

specs.texture: Dense bubble core with gold spark pixels and a darker lower rim.
specs.shading: Flat fill with a heavy dark base.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 192x48px with 4 columns and 1 row.
The body mass reads heavier than the normal tier within one frame.
The gold inner spark never exceeds a 6x6px cluster.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_slime_units
reference_images.purpose: Grounds slime silhouettes, evolution scale, and facial placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with a slower fixed-step timer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_bubble_heavy_idle_4f_6fps.png during the Loading state and register it as a heavier-tier atlas entry.
runtime_notes: Keep collision and weight data outside the art bundle.
Use the same transform origin as the normal bubble.
Limit the inner spark to palette-correct pixels.
